name: Fall Guys Collaboration
description:
Get ready to party like the Beans of the BlunderdomeŌöĆthe Fall Guys collaboration event will be underway from Tuesday, 31 October to Sunday, 31 December! We've updated the special site with more information on the event, as well as a preview of the exclusive rewards players can obtain.
This blunderous event is only a few days away, so keep your eyes on the prizes once the collaboration begins!
View the Fall Guys special site.
* After the initial collaboration event has ended, it will be held as a special event at irregular intervals.
